bead.title: agent: behavioral e2e tests for NoProgressCooldown + MaxNoChangesBeforeClose
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds behavioral e2e tests for the two new resolvers from bead 4 to prove they drive observable loop behavior (claim reattempts, bead closure after N no-change iterations).

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_resolvers_e2e_test.go (new) — TestNoProgressCooldownFromConfig, TestMaxNoChangesBeforeCloseFromConfig
- May extend testfixtures package from bead 6.5 with additional deterministic harness modes

Out-of-scope:
- Adding new resolvers — that was bead 4

See TD-024 §Test plan.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run 'TestNoProgressCooldownFromConfig|TestMaxNoChangesBeforeCloseFromConfig' ./internal/agent/... passes against real .ddx/config.yaml fixtures. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
